patternBlindReview.rationale: Pattern-level blind applications can expose abstraction risk, but they do not validate the experience, staging, art, or composition of a complete generated game.

generatedCandidateBlindReview.rationale: P7 must first prove that the autonomous workflow can finish a playable candidate before the evaluation phase is allowed to block release.

wholeGameBlindAttribution.veto: Two independent reviewers stably attribute the shipped topology, object-role sequence, audiovisual staging, or encounter composition to one protected commercial source.
